prestazioni: Full hybrid turbo system upgrade for the N57S 3.0L inline-6 diesel engine (B57D30S0), featuring a Garrett GTX4274R ball-bearing turbocharger with a 74mm compressor wheel and 62mm turbine, paired with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 secondary turbo for sequential compound boost, achieving 550+ hp and 850+ lb-ft of torque with a custom ECU flash from Dimsport Genius on a standalone AEM Infinity 8 ECU

Fully built transmission reinforcement for the ZF 8HP76X 8-speed automatic, including a PWR Performance Products billet torque converter with a 3,800 RPM stall speed, upgraded Sonnax valve body with reinforced solenoids, and a custom Quaife ATB differential with 4.10 final drive ratio for improved acceleration

Full cooling and fuel system overhaul, including a CSF Racing 7-row aluminum radiator with integrated oil cooler, a Setrab 10-row front-mount intercooler with custom piping, a dual Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump setup with upgraded Siemens 1050cc injectors, and a custom 3.5L fuel surge tank from Radium Engineering
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny X7 widebody conversion kit (Pandem X701), featuring extended carbon fiber fenders with aggressive 50mm flares, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust outlets from Remus Sport

Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the X7 chassis, and adjustable camber plates from H&R, paired with a full Air Lift Performance 3P air suspension system with AccuAir ENDO-CVT management for stance adjustments

Custom 23-inch forged BBS FI-R wheels in a staggered setup (23x10.5 ET35 front, 23x12.5 ET40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear), wrapped in a full 3M Matte Military Green vinyl wrap with gloss black accents and custom M Performance carbon fiber mirror caps
